title: Warm Golden Irish Sultanas Casserole
description: A comforting Irish dish featuring gooey sultanas pasta and a halal-friendly sauce. Serve warm in a terracotta dish.
instructions: Cook the penne pasta in boiling water until al dente, reserve 250ml of pasta water.
In a saucepan melt the butter over medium heat, add the all-purpose flour and mix until it forms a paste.
Gradually add the reserved pasta water to the saucepan, whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2 minutes, until it thickens.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the milk, salt, and ground black pepper.
Add the cooked penne pasta to the saucepan and mix well to combine.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a terracotta dish.
Top the pasta mixture with sultanas and sprinkle with salt.
Cover the terracotta dish with aluminum foil and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the foil and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Serve the Warm Golden Irish Sultanas Casserole warm.
